series_metadata.series_description: Individual taxpayer files assembled in the following tax areas: EWH, PIT, Sales. These files contain research on potentially owed tax, due to the State of Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five years after case is closed or account is assessed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Five years after case is closed or account is assessed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
